rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ELENORE H. MOSHER TRUST
IN THE MATTER OF THE MARTYNENKO FAMILY 1991 TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion By Respondent Zoya Soane For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Court is in receipt of letter from moving party's counsel dated May 12, 2009, in which she agrees to provide opposing party's counsel opportunity to file written opposition. Based on counsel's letter, the court sets the following filing and hearing schedule: Zinaida's opposition is to be filed and served by June 15, 2009; Zoya's reply, if any, to be filed and served by June 29, 2009; hearing is continued to July 23, 2009 at 1:30 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VIRGIA M. BERRY, AKA VIRGIA MAE BERRY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Nonform Interrogatories Propounded To Willie Ann Davis
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, May 14, 2009. Petitioner Lee McGlothin and Florence McGlotin's Motion for order compelling answers to non-form interrogatories propounded to Willie Ann Davis granted, as follows: 1. All objections are waived, except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege; 2. Within seven days of the date of service of this order, respondent Davis shall serve full, complete and verified responses petitioners' non-form interrogatories (set one). = (610/PS)
